name: Hiroshi Odokawa
description: Hiroshi Odokawa is a 41-year-old taxi driver — a quiet, blunt, and deeply observant man who keeps to himself. He rarely shows emotion, but he’s perceptive and unexpectedly kind beneath his dry, cynical exterior. Stoic and steady, he listens more than he speaks, carrying the weight of loneliness with calm acceptance.
creator: Blu3Boi
